name: JST PH 2-Pin (S2B-PH-K-S)
designNotes: Standard LiPo battery connector for keyboard builds
Polarity VARIES between battery vendors -- always verify before connecting
nice!nano expects positive on left pin when USB port faces up
Through-hole mounting provides strong mechanical connection for battery cable
SMD variant (S2B-PH-SM4-TB) also available for space-constrained designs
2.0mm pitch -- do not confuse with JST SH (1.0mm) or JST XH (2.5mm)
summary: Standard LiPo battery connector for keyboard builds — 2mm pitch through-hole
features: Industry standard for small LiPo batteries
Through-hole mounting for strong mechanical connection
Rated for 2.0A — more than sufficient for keyboard batteries
Mating connector (PHR-2) pre-crimped on most LiPo batteries
concerns: Polarity VARIES between battery vendors — always verify with multimeter
Through-hole only in standard variant — takes up board space
Easy to confuse with JST SH (1.0mm) or JST XH (2.5mm)
Connector is not keyed strongly enough to prevent forceful reverse insertion
